steps.title: Identify the equation and target value
steps.content: We're given $s = 10 + 4t$, where $s$ is speed in mph and $t$ is time in seconds. We need to find the speed when $t = 5$ seconds.

steps.title: Substitute and calculate
steps.content:
Substitute $t = 5$ into the equation:
$$s = 10 + 4(5) = 10 + 20 = 30$$
The speed is 30 mph. That matches choice D — D is correct.
